AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • NgModule

    Class NgModule

    Modules are collections of application configuration information for components: controllers, directives, filters, etc. They provide recipes for the injector to do the actual instantiation. A module itself has no behaviour but only state. A such, it acts as a data structure between the Angular instance and the injector service.

    Index

    Constructors

    constructor

    Properties

    name

          name: string,
          requires: string[],
          configFn?: Injectable<(...args: any[]) => any>,
      ): NgModule

      Parameters

      • name: string

        Name of the module

      • requires: string[]

        List of modules which the injector will load before the current module

      • OptionalconfigFn: Injectable<(...args: any[]) => any>

      Returns NgModule

    controller

    • controller(name: string, ctlFn: Injectable<ControllerConstructor>): NgModule

      The $controller service is used by Angular to create new controllers. This provider allows controller registration via the register method.

      Parameters

      • name: string

        Controller name

      • ctlFn: Injectable<ControllerConstructor>

        Controller constructor fn (optionally decorated with DI annotations in the array notation)

      Returns NgModule

    sse

    • sse(name: string, url: string, options?: SseConfig): NgModule

      Register a pre-configured SSE connection during module configuration.

        Injectable name

      • url: string

      • Optionaloptions: SseConfig = {}

    value

    • value(name: string, object: any): NgModule

      Parameters

      • name: string
      • object: any

        Allows undefined

      Returns NgModule

    wasm

    • wasm(
          name: string,
          src: string,
          imports?: Record<string, any>,
          opts?: WasmOptions,
      ): NgModule

      Register a named WebAssembly module that will be instantiated via $provide.

      Parameters

      • name: string

        The injectable name used to access the instantiated WebAssembly module.

      • src: string

        URL of the .wasm file to fetch and instantiate.

      • Optionalimports: Record<string, any> = {}

        WebAssembly import object, passed to WebAssembly.instantiate or WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming.

      • Optionalopts: WasmOptions = {}

        Configuration object.

        Supported keys:

        • raw: boolean
          • false (default): the injectable resolves to instance.exports (ideal for plain WASM modules).
          • true: the injectable resolves to the full instantiation result: { instance, exports, module } (required for runtimes such as Go, Emscripten, wasm-bindgen, etc).

      Returns NgModule

    websocket

    • websocket(
          name: string,
          url: string,
          protocols?: string[],
          options?: WebSocketConfig,
      ): NgModule

      Register a pre-configured WebSocket connection during module configuration.

      Parameters

      • name: string

        Injectable name

      • url: string

        WebSocket endpoint

      • Optionalprotocols: string[] = []

        Optional subprotocols

      • Optionaloptions: WebSocketConfig = {}

        Optional WebSocket configuration

      Returns NgModule

    worker

    • worker(name: string, scriptPath: string | URL, config?: WorkerConfig): NgModule

      Register a named worker that will be instantiated via $provide.

      Parameters

      • name: string
      • scriptPath: string | URL
      • Optionalconfig: WorkerConfig

      Returns NgModule
